violations.text: The freezer on the cooking line was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2026
A drain tube was observed draining from the ceiling into the handsink in the kitchen. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2026
Ceiling tiles by the hood and above the coffee area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Contents were voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine must be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on two door freezer and the two door reach in. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
The ceiling tile in the back prep room, and over the serving line were observed in poor condition. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
The hood system was observed with and excess of debris. The hood system must be maintained clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025
